description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features a smooth, curved skating surface with vertical extensions on both ends, and is adorned with vibrant graffiti art and tags along its exterior walls. Metal guardrails run along the top edges for safety, and a staircase with a platform provides access to the upper level. The ramp includes a central cutout or tunnel, allowing passage through the structure. The wood panels are joined seamlessly, and the overall build is robust, designed to withstand heavy use by skateboarders and BMX riders.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal guardrails, graffiti art, and a staircase leading to an upper platform. The structure is robust and designed for skateboarding or BMX use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat exterior wall covered in graffiti, the central cutout, and the staircase with guardrails on the left.
description_view_1: Interior view of the half-pipe, highlighting the smooth curved skating surface, graffiti on the inner walls, and the open skating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more graffiti art, the central tunnel, and the staircase structure on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite interior view of the half-pipe, showing the curved surface, graffiti, and the peace symbol on the right wall.
